title: Hips Don't Lie
why_this_song: Hips Don't Lie by Shakira (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Shakira, Shakira"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I'm on tonight, you know my hips don't lie"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Oh, baby, when you talk like that"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'm on tonight, you know my hips don't lie"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ladies up in here tonight"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I never really knew that she could dance like this
Reading the signs of my body
I'm on tonight, you know my hips don't lie
And I'm starting to feel you, boy
Come on, let's go, real slow

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shakira" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shakira" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You make a woman go mad

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She makes a man wanna speak Spanish
I don't, don't really know what I'm doing

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Shakira one question about "Hips Don't Lie", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Shakira sobre "Hips Don't Lie", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Hips Don't Lie" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Hips Don't Lie" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hips Don't Lie" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hips Don't Lie" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
